name: Pork Chops and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 cups salted water to a boil. Add the uncooked rice and cook until tender.
2. Season pork chops with flour and salt, then brown in oil.
3. Add the mushroom soup and 1/4 cup water to the pan. Cover and cook for 15 minutes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish. Top with cooked rice and arrange pork chops on top.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the pork chops are tender.
